reviews.comment:
Lugares para acampar con parrilla y baños,muchos árboles,lo único malo que el shop es chico no es muy completo y no tiene casi comida

(Translated by Google)
Campsites with grills and restrooms, lots of trees, the only downside is that the shop is small, not very well stocked, and has almost no food

reviews.comment:
Pase a las 5 de la mañana del 8 de enero, un solo playero, ensima llega camión supongo de un campo a llevar varios tachos de 200 lts. De diésel, salgo temprano para llegar temprano, y pierdo media hora acá, ensima no tiene débito, solo efectivo. Menos mal que es estación ACA

(Translated by Google)
I passed by at 5 a.m. on January 8th. A single beachcomber arrived. Then, a truck, I suppose, arrived from a field to carry several 200-liter diesel drums. I left early to arrive early, and I lost half an hour here. Plus, there's no debit card, only cash. Thank goodness it's an ACA station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMU9IT0JnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, ideal for a stop along the way
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzaE9icEhnEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The gas station is small, the convenience store is small, but the service is great. Besides the gas station, the parking lot is a public camping area with a barbecue grill, restrooms, and all the infrastructure a camper needs. It's worth stopping by for a rest.

(Original)
O Posto é pequeno, a loja de conveniência é pequena, mas o atendimento é ótimo. Além do Posto o estacionamento é uma área pública de camping, com churrasqueira, banheiros e toda infra que um campista precisa. Vale a parada para dar uma descansada.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzdU5Dd05nEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
